added: Structured display name system — first name, last name, and optional nickname fields
Display mode toggle in Edit Profile — choose to show 'First & Last Name' or 'Nickname'
Live name preview in Edit Profile modal shows how your name will appear across the app
First and last name collected during signup
changed: Edit Profile modal now has separate First Name, Last Name, and Nickname fields instead of a single Name input
Search now matches against first name, last name, and nickname in addition to username and display name
Existing users' display names automatically parsed into first/last name fields via migration

fixed: Twitter/X links now show rich preview cards with images, video thumbnails, and tweet text (via FxTwitter API — Microlink couldn't scrape X)
TikTok links now show rich preview cards with thumbnails and captions (via official oEmbed API — blockquote embed was unreliable)
App now opens to home feed by default instead of remembering last page from a previous session

added: Try On preview button in Skin Shop — live-preview any skin, font, logo, icon set, coin skin, template, or nav style before buying
Group premium skin background image — upload, darkness, frosted glass, and card transparency controls (same as profile skins)
changed: Shop cards for unowned items now show 'Try On' button alongside Buy button
Try-on auto-reverts when switching to My Skins tab, navigating away, or toggling off
Purchasing an item while trying it on keeps it applied without reverting
fixed: Group premium skin background image now shows through instead of being covered by grey page background
Group premium skins without a background image now use the skin's actual theme color instead of hardcoded grey
Cross-tab skin bleeding — switching between tabs no longer overwrites group skin with personal skin
Saved posts page images stretched too wide — post cards now capped at 680px width
Group icon picker buttons now use the group's active skin color instead of default theme
Picking a group icon no longer deletes the group's profile picture

added: Combined Skins page with pill toggle between 'Skin Shop' and 'My Skins' views
changed: Skin Shop and My Skins merged into single 'Skins' nav page, freeing up a nav slot
Nav bar shows one 'Skins' link instead of separate 'Skins' and 'Skin Shop' links
Dropdown 'My Skins' opens the Skins page with My Skins toggle active
Old #skins URLs redirect to #shop with My Skins view

added: GIF search in comments — Klipy-powered GIF picker with search and trending
GIF button in comment input bar opens a 2-column searchable GIF grid
Clicking a GIF auto-posts it as a comment with inline image rendering
changed: Comment input bar now has GIF button between text input and Post button
GIF comments stored as [gif]URL[/gif] in content field (no schema changes)

added: Server-side group coin RPC (add_group_coins) — all members see same balance
Group coins earned for comments and replies in groups (+2 each)
Group post dropdown menu: Save, Report, Hide, Edit (own), Delete (own)
changed: Group coins now persist to database (shared across all users, not localStorage)
Group shop purchases sync coin spending to database
Group like/dislike properly awards both personal (+1) and group (+1) coins
Group posts now have same options as main feed posts (except Share)
fixed: Group coins from likes/dislikes never awarded (regex didn't match UUID post IDs)
No group coins awarded for commenting or replying in groups
Could earn coins for liking own posts in groups (isOwnPost now checks group feed)
Group likes/dislikes not synced to Supabase (sbToggleLike calls were missing)
Group posts missing three-dot menu (no way to edit, delete, save, report, or hide)

added: Group photos now persist to Supabase Storage (profile + cover)
Screenshot attachment in feedback modal (optional, uploads to Storage)
changed: Personal profile feed excludes group posts
Group coin balance synced from database instead of local state
fixed: Group profile/cover photos disappearing on reload (now uploaded to Storage + saved to DB)
Group posts appearing on personal profile feed
Group view layout — posts off to the side on tablet (CSS grid fix)
Group coins showing 0 (coin_balance not mapped from DB)

added: Video auto-pause on scroll — videos stop when scrolled off-screen
Autoplay setting toggle in Settings controls scroll behavior
Security hardening Phase 2: rate limiting, upload validation, admin logs
changed: DM sending now server-side rate limited (30 msgs/60s)
Search uses server-side parameterized query (no more string interpolation)
File uploads restricted to JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF only
fixed: Instagram/TikTok/Spotify embeds now pause when scrolled away
RLS gaps patched for notifications, messages, user_skins, group_skins
Multiple videos could play simultaneously without being able to find them

added: XSS sanitization on 45+ user-content injection points
Cookie consent banner gating all third-party embeds
Delete My Account button in Settings with double confirmation
Super Admin Panel with user management, suspend, and delete
Profile RLS — sensitive columns hidden from other users
changed: Own profile data now fetched via secure RPC instead of direct query
Admin actions enforced server-side via SECURITY DEFINER functions
Geolocation changed to opt-in (was firing unconditionally)
fixed: Search injection via PostgREST filter characters
Admin privilege escalation blocked (is_admin column revoked from client)

added: Inline media embeds for YouTube, Vimeo, TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, Spotify, SoundCloud
Version-based TOS acceptance system — forces re-accept on TOS update
Newline preservation in posts, comments, and messages
Updated Terms of Service (v3) with 21 sections
My Posts tab in main feed
changed: YouTube embeds switched to privacy-enhanced youtube-nocookie.com
Instagram embeds switched to iframe for reliable mobile playback
Video embeds use proper 16:9 aspect ratio container
fixed: Suggestion name overflow cutting into neighboring cards
People You May Know moved from hidden left sidebar to right sidebar

added: Per-photo comments in lightbox viewer (desktop panel + mobile sheet)
Per-photo likes and dislikes with optimistic UI
Album system with pill tabs, upload, and drag-scroll
Saved posts page with folder pill tabs
Report / Feedback modal in Settings
Mobile bottom nav bar extended to tablets (≤768px)
changed: Coins no longer awarded for interacting with your own content
Albums tab shown for all users (own + others), not just self
fixed: Tablet swipe jumping to wrong category in skin shops
Groups page defaults to My Groups tab
Mobile refresh going to home screen (localStorage fallback)
Photos disappearing on reload (race condition)
Cross-device sync not working on mobile (visibilitychange listener)
Saved posts not showing up (was only checking current feed)
Premium transparency bleeding into group view
Group skins bleeding between groups
